lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has minor scratches and some paint fading. The interior shows noticeable wear on the upholstery. Mechanical components are currently functional.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior have significant damage and heavy signs of wear. There are known mechanical and electrical issues that require immediate repair.

Get ready for your next adventure with this dependable daily driver! While it shows some honest signs of wear and tear, this car is in fair condition and offers fantastic value for anyone looking for reliable transportation. It's a practical choice that's ready to hit the road today!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine currently runs but suffers from a persistent oil leak and a rough idle, while the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping. Externally, there is visible rust on the lower rocker panels and several large dents on the passenger side. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the fabric seats and a cracked dashboard. This car is being sold as-is and is recommended for someone looking for a major project or a source for parts.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior is clean and retains a nice shine, though there are a few minor imperfections including small stone chips on the front fascia and a light scuff on the rear passenger-side door. Inside, the cabin is in great shape with no tears in the upholstery, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound, shifts smoothly, and has a documented service history. It is a reliable, solid choice for anyone looking for a well-cared-for vehicle that presents well.
The car is in mint condition.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it presents in commendable condition, both mechanically and aesthetically. Its consistent service history underscores a commitment to longevity, making it an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, premium motoring experience.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable car, and it has been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable ride that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, so it’s ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin.

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies. Mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential, the drivetrain offers exceptional mechanical feedback. The chassis remains taut with a recently inspected rear subframe and refreshed suspension bushings. Finished in Carbon Black, the exterior shows minor road wear consistent with driver-focused use, while the interior retains its structural integrity. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and valve adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates within factory tolerances. A purist-spec driver’s car ready for the canyons.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Clear title in hand.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility, presenting in well-maintained condition both inside and out. The engine pulls smoothly with a responsive transmission, and the suspension remains tight through corners. Inside, you’ll find a clean, smoke-free cabin with high-quality upholstery that shows only light signs of careful use. The exterior retains a deep shine with just a few minor, age-appropriate blemishes that don’t detract from its overall sharp appearance. All major service intervals have been strictly followed, including recent fluid changes and a fresh set of tires. It’s a reliable, turn-key car ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-standing reliability. We invite you to experience a standard of quality that distinguishes this offering within its class.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating a refined balance of performance and aesthetic integrity, the automobile has been curated to ensure a sophisticated driving experience. Its mechanical soundness and well-preserved interior reflect a standard of excellence that distinguishes it within its class, offering both reliability and executive presence.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been super well-loved? This beauty is ready for its next big adventure! It's in great shape, runs like a dream, and has been my trusty companion for a while now. I've kept it clean and well-maintained, so it's totally ready for you to hop in and hit the road. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways—come check it out and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a driver’s specimen, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox delivering power to the rear wheels via a variable M differential lock. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement, ensuring mechanical
Reliable vehicle. Clean interior. Runs well. Regularly maintained. Good condition overall.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive overall shape, making it a reliable and stylish choice for its next owner. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, though you may find a few minor stone chips on the front bumper—purely cosmetic and expected for its mileage. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and has never been smoked in; the leather seats show only light softening on the driver’s side, and every button, switch, and display functions exactly as it should. Mechanically, it is sound, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from a consistent maintenance schedule. The tires offer plenty of tread for the seasons ahead, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a solid, honest car that drives as beautifully as it looks.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated for the discerning driver who prioritizes both performance and aesthetic integrity. Meticulously maintained and having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical precision and a well-preserved interior. This offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber vehicle that balances sophisticated styling with proven reliability.

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a harmonious balance of performance and refined aesthetics. Meticulously maintained to rigorous standards, it presents in commendable condition with a sophisticated interior and a robust, reliable drivetrain. Experience the prestige of a premium automobile that has been curated for those who demand both quality and lasting value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It’s clean, runs smoothly, and is just waiting for its next adventure with a new owner! If you're looking for a dependable ride that still looks great on the road, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The VANOS system has been comprehensively serviced, and the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. Performance is enhanced by a set of Bilstein B16 dampers and refreshed bushings, providing exceptional feedback through the steering rack. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the mechanical vitals—including the factory limited-slip differential and compression across all cylinders—remain within peak operating specifications. A visceral, analog machine ready for the twisties.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Engine runs smooth. Interior clean. Minor exterior scuffs. Maintenance records available.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor, expected road wear, while the interior remains a clean, non-smoker environment with supple upholstery and fully operational electronics. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced at regular intervals. With a documented maintenance history and tires in great shape, this car is ready for the road with no immediate repairs needed. It’s a dependable, high-quality choice for a buyer who values a well-cared-for machine.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection and remains in commendable mechanical and aesthetic condition. It offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning buyer who prioritizes both reliability and prestige. A premier selection within its class that reflects our commitment to quality and transparency.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Exhibiting consistent mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic, the automobile has been curated to ensure a seamless transition to its next proprietor. It offers a refined balance of performance and reliability, reflecting a standard of care that distinguishes it within the current market.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it for its next owner. Whether you’re cruising around town or hitting the highway, it’s super smooth and reliable. I've taken great care of it, and I'd love to see it go to a good home! Let me know if you want to come take it for a spin!

This BMW E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains composed thanks to a reinforced subframe and upgraded Bilstein PSS10 coilovers. Recent maintenance includes a VANOS overhaul and professional valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates with factory precision. Equipped with a factory limited-slip differential and staggered Style 67 wheels, this M-car offers visceral mechanical feedback and balanced handling dynamics. A driver-focused example in solid mechanical health, ready for the enthusiast who values performance pedigree.
Well-maintained vehicle. Mechanically sound. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Title in hand.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive overall condition. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only the minor road wear expected from a well-loved driver. Inside, the leather upholstery is supple and clean, reflecting a smoke-free and pet-free environment. Mechanically, it is robust; all scheduled maintenance has been performed on time, including a recent full synthetic oil change and brake inspection. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts flawlessly. It is a reliable, turn-key example that balances luxury and performance perfectly for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which represents a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic consistency. It offers a distinguished driving experience for the discerning professional who prioritizes reliability and refined engineering. This vehicle stands as a premier selection for those seeking a high-caliber automotive investment.
